case_title: FRED PAVLOW CO. INC. VS. ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-31-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY PLAINTIFF FRED PAVLOW CO. INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRED PAVLOW CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC. $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $183.73 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,083.73, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,475.00 FILED BY FRED PAVLOW CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED. HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ROEBUCK CONSTRUCTION INC. IS GRANTED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
